periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 74. Southwest wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Saturday
periods.short_forecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2pm and 4pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Partly sunny, with a high near 89. Southwest wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

periods.name: Saturday Night
periods.short_forecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 11pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11pm and 5am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 73. South wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

periods.name: Sunday
periods.short_forecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 2pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 87. Southwest wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
